title: Saro´s Banhammer Plugin
description: Take justice into your own hands! Saro's Ban Hammer lets you wield a legendary Mace that instantly bans players upon impact. Fully customizable with specific durations and ban reasons directly via command.
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_BanHammer/MP_SarosBanHammer_header.webp)

**Saro's Ban Hammer** is a Paper/Spigot plugin that gives server administrators a powerful and fun way to ban players. Simply hit a player with the legendary Ban Hammer mace to instantly ban them from your server!

**Mod Version:** https://modrinth.com/mod/saros-banhammer-mod

![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_BanHammer/MP_SarosBanHammer_description.webp)
- **Instant Ban on Hit** ⚔️
  - Hit any player with the Ban Hammer to instantly ban them from the server.

- **Customizable Ban Settings** ⚙️
  - Set custom ban duration and reason when obtaining the hammer.

- **Impressive Visual Design** ✨
  - The Ban Hammer is a mace with high-level enchantments for a powerful appearance.

- **EssentialsX Compatible** 🔧
  - Uses Bukkit's native ban API for full compatibility with other ban management plugins.

- **Server Broadcast** 📢
  - Announces bans to the entire server for maximum impact.

![Commands](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_BanHammer/MP_SarosBanHammer_commands.webp)

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/banhammer` | Get a permanent Ban Hammer |
| `/banhammer [duration]` | Get a Ban Hammer with custom duration |
| `/banhammer [duration] [reason]` | Get a Ban Hammer with custom duration and reason |

**Duration Format:**
- `s` - Seconds (e.g., `30s`)
- `m` - Minutes (e.g., `15m`)
- `h` - Hours (e.g., `2h`)
- `d` - Days (e.g., `7d`)
- `w` - Weeks (e.g., `2w`)
- `M` - Months (e.g., `1M`)
- `y` - Years (e.g., `1y`)

**Examples:**
```
/banhammer
/banhammer 7d
/banhammer 1h Griefing
/banhammer 30d Breaking server rules
```

![Permissions](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_BanHammer/MP_SarosBanHammer_permissions.webp)

| Permission | Description | Default |
|------------|-------------|---------|
| `banhammer.use` | Allows using the /banhammer command | OP |
| `banhammer.ban` | Allows banning players with the hammer | OP |


1. **Use the command** `/banhammer` to receive the Ban Hammer
2. **Optionally specify** duration and reason
3. **Equip the hammer** in your main hand
4. **Hit a player** to ban them instantly
5. **Watch the ban** be announced to the server!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/LNhvj_bq_Ho" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The Ban Hammer uses Minecraft 1.21's new mace weapon, making it the perfect tool for delivering justice on your server.

![Versions](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_BanHammer/MP_SarosBanHammer_versions.webp)
### Currently Supported

- **Paper 1.21.x** ✅
- **Spigot 1.21.x** ✅

*(Requires Minecraft 1.21+ for the mace item)*
